name: wardshield
description: AI development safety — protect your supply chain from malicious packages

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --external better-sqlite3 && mkdir -p dist/data && cp ../shared/data/top-packages.json dist/data/ && bun -e "const fs=require('fs');const f='dist/index.js';let c=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf-8');c=c.replace(/^#!.*\n/,'');fs.writeFileSync(f,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+c)"

author: Vanguard Defense Solutions
